name: travel-default
description: Suggested policy preset for the travel-agent starter. Tight cap because v1 only pays for flight data lookups (e.g. FlightAPI) — booking is deferred until the commerce rail (ACP) is live.
notes: v1 of travel-agent is search-and-surface — it pays for flight data and presents options. Actual booking is gated on ACP support and deferred.
Once booking is supported, this preset will need a higher cap. Don't loosen the policy until then.
Allowlisted services (gates which registered flight-data providers the agent may pay — e.g. FlightAPI) are managed in the Canopy dashboard.
